subprocess/STARTUPINFO/dwFlags.name: dwFlags
subprocess/STARTUPINFO/dwFlags.description: A bit field that determines whether certain STARTUPINFO attributes are used when the process creates a window. si = subprocess.STARTUPINFO() si.dwFlags = subprocess.STARTF_USESTDHANDLES | subprocess.STARTF_USESHOWWINDOW

info.excerpt: A bit field that determines whether certain STARTUPINFO attributes are used when the process creates a window. si = subprocess.STARTUPINFO() si.dwFlags = subprocess.STARTF_USESTDHANDLES | subprocess.S...

subprocess/DETACHED_PROCESS.name: DETACHED_PROCESS
subprocess/DETACHED_PROCESS.description: A Popen creationflags parameter to specify that a new process will not inherit its parent’s console. This value cannot be used with CREATE_NEW_CONSOLE. Added in version 3.7.

info.excerpt: A Popen creationflags parameter to specify that a new process will not inherit its parent’s console. This value cannot be used with CREATE_NEW_CONSOLE. Added in version 3.7.

subprocess/DEVNULL.name: DEVNULL
subprocess/DEVNULL.description: Special value that can be used as the stdin, stdout or stderr argument to Popen and indicates that the special file os.devnull will be used. Added in version 3.3.

info.excerpt: Special value that can be used as the stdin, stdout or stderr argument to Popen and indicates that the special file os.devnull will be used. Added in version 3.3.
